summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: triangle with i (RED top), j (GREEN bottom-left), k (BLUE bottom-right). ValueTracker step_tr cycles through 6 products ij=k, jk=i, ki=j (cyclic) and reversed ji=-k, kj=-i, ik=-j (negatives); always_redraw pair of colored arrows start→mid→end. Non-commutativity visualized via reversed arrow for negative products.
